# ItMadeMyDay

> A private iOS app for capturing and revisiting moments that made your day — compliments, memories, quotes, photos, and links. No account required. No data collected. Everything stays on your device.

ItMadeMyDay is a free iOS app that acts as a personal joy vault. Users log moments across six categories: Compliments, Memories, Heart-to-Hearts, Quotes, Links, and Photos. A Boost feature lets users browse saved moments filtered by current mood (Sad, Anxious, Lonely, Celebrating, Grateful). Collections allow curated groups of moments. Built fully local-first — no server, no sync, no tracking.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://itmademyday.app/): App overview, features, and download
- [Support](https://itmademyday.app/support.html): Help, contact, and FAQs
- [Privacy Policy](https://itmademyday.app/privacy-policy.html): Zero-data privacy policy

## What This Product Does

- Saves moments in six categories: Compliments, Memories, Heart-to-Hearts, Quotes, Links, Photos
- Provides mood-based browsing via Boost (filter by Sad, Anxious, Lonely, Celebrating, Grateful)
- Organizes moments into user-created Collections
- Operates fully offline with no account, no cloud sync, and no data collection
- Supports JSON export and import for data portability
- Available free on iOS with no in-app purchases or subscriptions

## Privacy

ItMadeMyDay collects zero user data. The app has no server connection. All data is stored using local device storage and never transmitted anywhere.

- [Terms of Use](https://itmademyday.app/terms.html): Usage terms
